/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/websocket_client.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/websocket_client.dir/websocket_client.cpp.o -o websocket_client  ../_deps/fmt-build/libfmt.a -lpthread -luring /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
